title: Guns, Blimps, and Factories
description: Enhances Minecraft with guns, blimps, factories, and even rockets.
body:
# VERSION 3 IS OUT
## **What does this modpack add?**
  This modpack adds a lot of new content, as it was made to make your minecraft experience last longer. That new content can range from building a plane to exploring the cosmos in a fully custom vehicle made of blocks. There's new combat, new weapons, new places to explore, and new challenges to overcome. You can fly to a collossal building in your airship during a rainy night and loot it for everything it has, or make a drivable drill to get every resource you can find. The possibilities are truly endless.

  _Join our [Discord](https://discord.gg/zttxVxUdad), where you can find the official Minecraft server for this mod._
